Henrik Zetterberg

Full Name: Henrik Zetterberg

(Hank, Z, Ice Berg, ZÃ¤ta, Zetterbeard)

Position: C •  Shoots: Left

6-0, 197lb (183cm, 89kg)

Born: October 9, 1980 in Njurunda, Sweden se

Draft: Detroit, 7th round (210th overall), 1999 NHL Entry

Pronunciation: \HEHN-rihk ZEH-tuhr-buhrg\

  • 1x Cup Winner
  • 2002-03 AR
  • 2007-08 Smythe
  • 1x All Star
  • 2014-15 Clancy

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Henrik Zetterberg?

Henrik Zetterberg is 45 years old.

When was Henrik Zetterberg born?

Henrik Zetterberg was born on October 9, 1980.

Where was Henrik Zetterberg born?

Henrik Zetterberg was born in Njurunda, Sweden.

How tall is Henrik Zetterberg?

Henrik Zetterberg is 6-0 (183 cm) tall.

How much did Henrik Zetterberg weigh when playing?

Henrik Zetterberg weighed 197 lbs (89 kg) when playing.

Is Henrik Zetterberg in the Hockey Hall of Fame?

Henrik Zetterberg has not been elected into the Hockey Hall of Fame.

How many goals did Henrik Zetterberg have?

Henrik Zetterberg had 337 goals over his career.

How many points did Henrik Zetterberg have?

Henrik Zetterberg had 960 points over his career.

How many Stanley Cups has Henrik Zetterberg won?

Henrik Zetterberg has won 1 Stanley Cup as a player.

When did Henrik Zetterberg retire?

Henrik Zetterberg last played in 2018.
